item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Authentic Greek moussaka – Layers of soft eggplant, spicedground meat, and velvety béchamel sauce, gratinated with golden cheese andfresh herbs. Served with a crisp mixed salad tossed in a light mustardvinaigrette (1, 6, 11, 13, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: GREEN DISH: vegetarian burger – Bhaji – Crispy fried patty madefrom caramelized onions, potatoes, and spinach, served in a soft homemade pavbun. Accompanied by fresh green herb chutney, creamy cucumber raita, and finelyshredded iceberg lettuce on the side (1, 6, 13, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Gratinated cauliflower and leeks – Baked in a creamy béchamel sauce withnutmeg, topped with crispy breadcrumbs and melted cheese. Served with a heartybean purée and a light mustard vinaigrette. (6, 11, 15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Pasta al forno – baked pasta layered with creamy mornay sauce, crispvegetables, and melted cheese, gratinated to golden perfection (1, 2, 6, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Creamy mushroom risotto served with pickled spring onions, fresh chervil, andtopped with Parmesan cheese (6).
